name: relative-time
description: Displays a date as a localized phrase relative to now, auto-updating

meta.name: RelativeTime
meta.description: Displays a date as a localized phrase relative to now, auto-updating

props.name: date
props.description: The date to render relative to now.

props.name: sync
props.description: When true, updates the relative time as it elapses.

props.name: now
props.description: Override "now" (ms); disables the interval. Pass a serialized server timestamp under SSR for a byte-deterministic render.

examples.title: SSR deterministic
examples.description: Relative text is clock-dependent, so it is hydration-safe by default (the server text is kept and corrected on the client). Pass a serialized server timestamp via `now` when you need identical server/client output with no post-hydration correction.

whenToUse: Showing how long ago something happened in human terms ("3 minutes ago")
Timestamps in feeds, comments, and activity logs where recency matters more than precision
Anywhere a self-updating relative time is friendlier than an absolute date
whenNotToUse: Precise timestamps in tables or audit logs — use formatDate for an exact, sortable value
Dates far in the past/future where "2 years ago" is less useful than the actual date

antiPatterns.bad: <RelativeTime date={date} /> as the only representation of a legal/audit timestamp
antiPatterns.good: <time>{formatDate(date)}</time> for exact records; RelativeTime for casual recency
antiPatterns.why: Relative phrases lose precision; the exact date belongs in records (RelativeTime still exposes it via title/datetime)

related.name: Stat
related.reason: Use alongside Stat to timestamp a metric’s last update

intent.a11yRationale: Renders a native <time> element with a machine-readable datetime and the absolute date in the title, so the precise instant is available even though the visible text is relative

flexibility.note: Pass Intl.RelativeTimeFormat options (e.g. numeric: "auto") to tune the wording
Disable ticking for static contexts or long-past dates
